scope_note: QA PIM Kernel Cert family [157]: certifies correctness of QA-native Processing-In-Memory kernels (RESIDUE_SELECT, TORUS_SHIFT, RADD_m, RMUL_m, MIRROR4, ROLLING_SUM_PHASE) and Chinese Remainder Theorem with non-coprime moduli support. Extracted from qa_graph_pim_repo_v2 vault artifact (Sept 2025), now at qa_lab/qa_pim/. PIM kernels operate at coordinate layer (0-indexed); QA state-level A1 enforcement at observer layer.
